title: Ambt Delden (Wines) (Tariff notice  24)
body: "New regulation  For information only.  A new regulation was published on 12 November 2025.  This published Regulation C/2025/6054 is a request for cancellation of a geographical indication.  Description of the goods  Ambt Delden (wines)  Classification (Combined Nomenclature (CN) code)  2204  Reason On 8 July 2024 the name ‘Twente’ (PDO) was included in the Union register of geographical indications. The geographical area of the name ‘Ambt Delden’ (PDO) was also included in this name’s geographical area. The geographical area of ‘Ambt Delden’ (PDO) has thus become part of that of ‘Twente’ (PDO). The duplicate geographical area created has therefore made the name ‘Ambt Delden’ (PDO) superfluous, leading to a producer request to cancel the registration of this name. In accordance with Article 25(2) of Regulation (EU) 2024/1143, a request to cancel the registration of ‘Ambt Delden’ (PDO) is submitted.  Contact Details   Tariff ClassificationCustoms Policy & Strategy3rd Floor14 Westfield AvenueStratfordLondonE20 1HZ   Email:  tariff.classification@hmrc.gov.uk  This Tariff Notice is published for information purposes only. "

taxons.title: UK Trade Tariff and classification of goods
